name: desktop
description: Desktop application for Droid CLI with real-time command execution

author.name: The San Francisco AI Factory, Inc.

scripts.dev: echo '\n[desktop] Dev logs streaming to /tmp/factory-dev-desktop.log\n' && npm run clean && npm run start:local 2>&1 | tee /tmp/factory-dev-desktop.log
scripts.dev:win: npm run clean && npm run start:local
scripts.dev:devtools: cross-env ENABLE_REACT_DEVTOOLS=true concurrently --kill-others --names "DEVTOOLS,ELECTRON" -c "cyan,green" "npm run devtools" "npm run start:local"
scripts.start:local: cross-env FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=development FACTORY_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=localhost FACTORY_DROID_SDK_TRANSPORT_LOG=1 VITE_MODE=localhost electron-forge start
scripts.start:dev: cross-env FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=development FACTORY_DROID_SDK_TRANSPORT_LOG=1 VITE_MODE=development electron-forge start
scripts.package:dev: cross-env FACTORY_ENV=development FACTORY_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=development FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=development VITE_MODE=development electron-forge package
scripts.build:local: cross-env FACTORY_ENV=development FACTORY_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=localhost FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=development VITE_MODE=localhost electron-forge make
scripts.build:dev: cross-env FACTORY_ENV=development FACTORY_DEPLOYMENT_ENV=development FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=development VITE_MODE=development electron-forge make
scripts.build:staging: cross-env FACTORY_ENV=production FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=staging VITE_MODE=production electron-forge make
scripts.build:prod: cross-env FACTORY_ENV=production FACTORY_RELEASE_CHANNEL=production VITE_MODE=production electron-forge make
scripts.setup: node scripts/install-electron.js && node scripts/patch-electron-protocol.js && node scripts/rebuild-native.js
